inputs.label: Current Weight
inputs.businessContext: The user's current body weight in kilograms

inputs.label: Target Weight
inputs.businessContext: The desired target body weight in kilograms

inputs.label: Daily Calorie Deficit
inputs.businessContext: Average daily calorie deficit (diet + exercise) required to lose weight

inputs.label: Calories per kg of fat
inputs.businessContext: Energy required to lose one kilogram of body fat, typically 7700 kcal
